name: devspec
description: Connect Claude Code to DevSpec: autopilot staged action items, interactive /devspec.* workflows, and Agents-page remote control.

devspec_token.title: DevSpec API token
devspec_token.description: Your DevSpec API token with read_write scope. Create one in DevSpec under You → Connections → Connect a tool (pick Read & write). It starts with 'dvs_' and is account-wide — reuse the same token everywhere.
